title: Give me a voice
description: A simple mod that adds voice to your Minecraft character
body:
# Give me a voice

 

This is a simple mod that add voice to your Minecraft character.

 

 

 

### Summary:

 

- Sounds when you get hurt, die, also when you attack.
- Works on servers, perfect for roleplaying
- And more things are planned!
 

 

 

### How to use it?

 

To use it run the command  /chara_set <player> <set>
Set it's the character setup which it can be Man or Woman (with capitals). To remove voice set it to Null
 

 

 

Mod in development

 

 

### Join to our Discord server to learn more about the mod, follow the updates, and meet us.
